lines.hearsay: Two sets of rounds crossed at {place}, and stopped a while.
lines.gossip: {B} was going one way and {A} the other, and they stopped dead in the middle of {place} long enough to block it — whatever {A} brought off the mill road was halfway round the village before the cart moved again.
lines.report: {A} and {B} exchanged the day's dispatches at {place}, slot {slot}.
